_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: All NF1-deficient lines tested exhibited robust colony formation in these conditions, similar to the phenotype of an HSC1λ cell line in which the tumor-suppressor PTEN has been knocked out
details: NF1-deficient iHSCs exhibited robust colony formation in low-serum soft agar conditions, while NF1-proficient cells formed limited numbers of colonies
